case_title: SUSAN K. LIPSCHULTZ VS. CATHEDRAL HILL PLAZA APARTMENTS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,328.86 FILED BY LIPSCHULTZ, SUSAN K. ,SUCCESSOR TO KAREN FARNHAM AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL PLAZA APARTMENTS CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

TRIAL RESET TO APR-21-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-18-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LIPSCHULTZ, SUSAN K. ,SUCCESSOR TO KAREN FARNHAM AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL PLAZA APARTMENTS CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES L.P.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
TRIAL RESET TO APR-30-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $48.75) SERVED APR-14-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED APR-10-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL PLAZA APARTMENTS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR TRIAL TO MAY-27-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT MUST SERVE ANY DOCUMENTS IT INTENDS TO USE AT THE HEARING ON PLAINTIFF VIA FEDERAL EXPRESS BY MAY 20, 2009. PLAINTIFF WAS ADVUSED ORALLY BY THE COURT THAT SHE MAY APPEAR BY PHONE ON MAY 27, 2009. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
RETURN OF CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDOANLD. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT PRESENT IN COURT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL PLAZA APARTMENTS CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES L.P.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY CATHEDRAL HILL PLAZA APARTMENTS CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES L.P.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIPSCHULTZ, SUSAN K. ,SUCCESSOR TO KAREN FARNHAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL PLAZA APARTMENTS CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES L.P. $3,328.83 PRINCIPAL, $340.00 INTEREST, $178.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,847.58, DEFENDANT HAS THE BURDEN TO JUSTIFY ANY DEDUCTIONS FROM A SECURITY DEPOSIT. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE FAILED TO MEET THEIR BURDEN WITH THE EXCEPTION OF THE PARKING CHARGE OF $158.67. THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT DEFENDANTS ACTED IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED. SENT TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES L.P.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
